target: 12. Always Watching From the Side
Aaaaaaah!!!
E... M-Mio?
Kaha...!
(Mio... she got hit by the bullet!?)
Mio, did you protect me!?
…Shin-chan… Are you okay?
Don't worry about me! Hurry, get behind me...!
Tokiko...! You... to Mio-chan...!
A, a, M-Mio...!
Blood from Mio... blood is...! Did... did I... do this...!?
T-Tokiko…
(Toki-chan has returned to her senses...)
(Is it from the shock of shooting Mio…?)
...I understand Tokiko... better than... anyone else...
That's why... I knew right away... what Tokiko was planning to do next.
Mio, Mioooo!
I acted on my own... I'm sorry, Shin-chan...
Don't worry about it! You don't have to force yourself to talk anymore!
I might have... rushed into things... a bit...
But... it couldn't be helped... Normally... Tokiko would be the one to stop me...
But since she's... ended up... like this...
M-Mio-chan! Hang in there!!
No, Mio! Don't leave me behind!!
I'm sorry for making you sad, but... I'm happy... I got to hear your true feelings at the end...
Sh-Shin-chan... Sou-kun. Toki, ko... please—
Mio…?
Mio! This is a lie, right, Mio!? Open your eyes, Miooooo!!
You've really done it now, Tokiko.
Uwaaaah...!!
Don't make that face. It's not like we're the ones who did it.
Haine… Shide…!!!
My, Mio-chan was brave. You had a narrow escape, Shinpei-kun.
But thanks to that, I got to see something good. Friendship truly is a precious thing.
Regaining your sanity triggered by the death of your best friend... It was a truly moving scene.
Guh... kuuu...!!
Oh, what about Shadow Mio-chan?
Over here!
Oh, you can't move? Someone pull the nail out for Mio-chan.
Ow...! Pull it out more carefully.
How is it?
It's fine. Something like this will heal right away.
That's what she says, Tokiko-chan. Isn't that great?
The real one who was here until now, you completely killed her for us, so from now on, she is the real one.
Please stay together with her, forever and ever.
How dare you…!
Uwaaaaaaaah!!!
D-Disappeared...?
Toki... ko...?
How long are you going to dawdle? I'm getting tired of waiting.
No, no, tired of waiting or not, you've erased Tokiko-chan, haven't you?
It doesn't matter, does it? She'd already served her purpose anyway.
Even though we kept our promise, she betrayed us.
Well, that's true.
What an idiot. And after I was planning to let her be together with Mio...
It's a shame. Well, as a pawn to corner Shinpei-kun and the others, she worked quite well, didn't she?
I'll never forgive you guys!
Even if I die, you guys are the only ones I'll—
A thrown knife hit Shinpei's nail gun!
Your relied-upon weapon is gone now too. What will you do, Shin-chan?
D-Damn, my only remaining weapon...!
This is mostly your fault, you know, Shin-chan? Because you were ignoring me.
Then I'll use this knife—
This is mine. Don't touch it without permission.
Ugh... damn it...!
So... what do you guys plan to do?
Become a Shadow, or go to the same place as Hizuru and the others...
Either way is fine.
We're incredibly generous, you see. We'll let you choose whichever you prefer.
Hehe... Now then, what will you do?
(Don't give up, bird's-eye view! Take a bird's-eye view...!!)
(Nagumo-sensei, Nezu-san, Totsumura-san, and Koyuba-san have been taken out...)
(Ushio and Mio are already gone...)
(In front of me are Shide and Haine, and on top of that, Shadow Mio...)
(I have no weapons left. And the possibility of looping from now on is...)
Sh-Shinpei...?
Why have you been silent this whole time!
Shinpei, say something!
Ufufu, ahahahaha.
Ahahahaha, ahahahahaha!!
